purpose: Defines visual anchor-review checklist fields for generated weapon/class source and pixel sprite files.
rules: Anchor review starts only after file intake and metadata QA pass for a generated file.
Source review should happen before pixel review for the matching gender, tone, motion, and frame.
Reviewers should compare the image against pose, hitbox, and motion-frame reports instead of judging by image bounds alone.
A file can be promoted only after required review fields pass and no blocking visual notes remain.

requiredReviewFields.label: Canvas and framing match the 1254 source frame.
Skin tone matches the slot tone ID.
Standing frame keeps both foot baselines locked.
Hands, fists, or grips align with the frame anchor report.
Weapon, arrow, staff, or effect line follows the pose and hitbox report.
Only attack_hit reads as the damage-window frame.
Base underwear style remains consistent with the approved body set.
No text, watermark, accidental extra props, or background artifacts are present.
